items.name: Quick Jaw and Scalp Massage
items.description: Experience immediate relaxation with our quick jaw and scalp massage. This 15-minute add-on focuses on alleviating tension in the jaw and soothing the scalp, providing quick relief and a refreshing boost.

items.name: Eye Massage
items.description: Soothe tired eyes and reduce puffiness with a relaxing eye massage designed to relieve tension, improve circulation, prevent dry eyes, improve focus, and refresh your look. Perfect for those who spend long hours on screens.

items.name: Moxibustion
items.description: A soothing heat therapy using mugwort (moxa) to warm specific acupoints, improve circulation, and promote the flow of Qi. Helps relieve pain, reduce cold, and boost energy, supporting natural healing and fertility balance.

items.name: Cupping Therapy
items.description: This ancient practice uses specialized cups to create gentle suction, helping to increase blood flow, reduce muscle tightness, and release toxins from deep tissues. Ideal for those experiencing deep-seated tension, pain, or fatigue.

items.name: Gua Sha Therapy
items.description: A traditional Chinese healing technique that uses a smooth-edged tool to gently scrape the skin. Offers powerful therapeutic benefits—relieving muscle tension, improving circulation, and supporting natural detoxification. Effective for easing stiffness, inflammation, and chronic pain.

items.name: CBD
items.description: Enhance your massage with a CBD-infused cream or oil that can help reduce inflammation and soothe muscle soreness.

items.name: Aromatherapy Essential Oils
items.description: Elevate your massage experience with essential oils chosen for their therapeutic properties to enhance physical and emotional well-being.

items.name: Foot Exfoliating
items.description: Revitalize your feet with our exfoliating treatment that removes dead skin cells, leaving your feet soft and smooth. This refreshing add-on focuses on one of the body's most stressed areas.
